title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills for automation through three strategies: agents, hooks, and loops. The video reverse-engineers Cherny's workflow to identify underutilized but powerful Claude Code features and a decision framework for creating new skills.
